sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty stock hits all-time high at 675.95 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc. has reached an all-time high stock price of $675.95, reflecting a 63.82% increase over the past year. This performance highlights the company's robust growth and investor confidence, with a market capitalization nearing $30 billion. However, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued, with technical indicators showing it's in overbought territory.

feed.title: Upwork Inc (UPWK) Shares Gap Down to $19.21 on Jan 20
feed.summary: Upwork Inc (UPWK) shares gapped down on January 20th, trading at $19.21 after falling 3.32%. The stock is 13.93% below its 52-week high but 72.60% above its 52-week low. Analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $23.60, implying a 22.85% upside, with an "Outperform" recommendation from brokerage firms, although GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $15.14, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: Honda Shuts Down Joint Fuel-Cell Production with GM
feed.summary: Honda is ending its joint fuel-cell production venture with General Motors by the end of 2026, marking a shift towards independently developed hydrogen systems. This move aligns with Honda's long-term strategy for carbon neutrality by 2050 and emphasizes hydrogen as a core energy carrier. The Brownstown, Michigan facility, a joint venture since 2017, produced systems that powered vehicles like the CR-V e:FCEV.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP NAMED TO THE FORTUNE WORLD'S MOST ADMIRED COMPANIES™ 2026 LIST FOR THE FIRST TIME
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has been recognized for the first time on the Fortune World's Most Admired Companies 2026 list, acknowledging its global reputation for innovation, leadership, and culture. The company's Chairman and CEO, Jason Liberty, attributed this recognition to the dedication of their teams. This distinction follows a period of strategic growth and innovation, including new ship classes, expanded private destinations, and enhanced loyalty programs across its brands.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q4 Release
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) is projected to surpass its Q4 2025 earnings estimates, with expected earnings of $0.55 per share and revenues of $7.49 billion, despite a year-over-year decline in EPS. This positive outlook is supported by a 14.06% upward revision in consensus EPS estimates over the last 30 days and a strong Zacks Earnings ESP of +7.27% combined with a Zacks Rank #2. The company has a history of beating EPS estimates, exceeding them in three of the last four quarters.

feed.title: Conocophillips (COP) Receives a Buy from Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Sam Margolin maintained a Buy rating on Conocophillips (COP) with a price target of $132.00, following a previous Buy rating from TipRanks Google Oil and Gas Exploration and Production. This stands in contrast to J.P. Morgan, which recently downgraded COP to a Hold, and BofA, which downgraded it to Underperform due to valuation concerns. The article also notes recent corporate insider stock sales and the company's latest quarterly financials.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Real Estate Companies: Welltower (WELL) and Smith Douglas Homes Corp. Class A (SDHC)
feed.summary: This article examines analyst sentiments on two real estate companies, Welltower (WELL) and Smith Douglas Homes Corp. Class A (SDHC). Welltower received a "Strong Buy" consensus with a 10.6% upside, based on a Bank of America Securities analyst's Buy rating. In contrast, Smith Douglas Homes Corp. Class A has a "Hold" consensus, with Wells Fargo maintaining a Hold rating and an average price target indicating an 18.9% downside from current levels.

feed.title: United Airlines reports record revenue, raises 2026 EPS outlook
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:UAL, XETRA:UAL1) announced record fourth-quarter operating revenue of $15.4 billion and adjusted earnings per share of $3.10, exceeding analyst expectations. The increase was driven by rising premium and loyalty revenues. The airline also raised its adjusted EPS outlook for 2026 to $12 to $14, projecting continued growth despite challenges like government shutdowns and Boeing delivery delays.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Reaffirms Their Buy Rating on Delek US Holdings (DK)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Sam Margolin reaffirmed a Buy rating on Delek US Holdings (DK) on January 18, setting a price target of $53.00, while Mizuho Securities also issued a Buy rating. However, xAI reiterated a Hold rating on the stock. Delek US Holdings reported Q3 revenue of $2.89 billion and a net profit of $178 million, but corporate insider sentiment is negative due to increased selling.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb’s KarXT Safety Study: What Long-Term Urological Data Could Mean for BMY Investors
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) is conducting a 12-month, phase 4 safety study for its KarXT drug, focusing on urological safety in schizophrenia patients. This study aims to assess long-term bladder function and urinary safety, which are critical factors for patient adherence and market adoption of psychiatric medications. Positive results could significantly de-risk KarXT and enhance its market potential by addressing common side-effect concerns associated with existing treatments.

feed.title: MGM Goes Green in Vegas with 100% Solar-Powered Daytime Electricity
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International announced a significant milestone in its renewable energy strategy, with its Las Vegas Strip casinos now being 100% powered by solar energy during the daytime. This achievement follows the integration of 115 MW of solar energy and 400 MWh of battery storage from the new Escape Solar and Storage Project, complementing its existing 100 MW Mega Solar Array. The company aims to use 100% renewable electricity domestically by 2030, demonstrating that sustainable practices are viable for large gaming enterprises.

feed.title: BVI appoints Jim Hollingshead as CEO
feed.summary: BVI, an ophthalmic device company, has appointed Jim Hollingshead, former CEO of Insulet, as its new President and CEO. Hollingshead will lead BVI's global eye care business, leveraging a recent $1 billion financing round to accelerate product innovation and expand its global footprint. He replaces Shervin Korangy, who will now serve as an adviser to BVI and senior adviser to TPG Capital, BVI's private equity owner.

feed.title: Palantir Is the Ideal AI Software for Governments and Enterprises but at a Large Price to Investors
feed.summary: Palantir is highlighted as a leading AI company that provides proprietary platforms to optimize decision-making for both governments and enterprises. Its systems aggregate, clean, and analyze complex datasets, delivering actionable insights and continuous improvements through machine-learning-based solutions. While the technology is praised for driving efficiency, the article notes its high valuation presents a significant cost to investors.

feed.title: YieldBoost EA From 0.4% To 3.4% Using Options
feed.summary: Electronic Arts (EA) shareholders can boost their income from 0.4% to an annualized 3.4% by selling February covered calls at the $205 strike price. This strategy involves collecting a premium and offers a significant return if the stock is not "called away," though upside beyond $205 would be foregone in that scenario. The article also provides historical dividend data and volatility analysis to help assess the risk-reward of this options strategy.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Stock Tests Support Following Earnings Report
feed.summary: D.R. Horton's stock is testing support levels after its Q1 2026 earnings report, which, despite beating estimates, showed year-over-year declines in revenue and EPS. The housing market continues to face pressure from elevated mortgage rates, requiring sales incentives to sustain demand, though tight inventory supports pricing power. Analysts have mixed sentiments, and the stock's future movement depends on whether it can maintain its 50-day simple moving average as support.

feed.title: Power bills 28% lower: why Fortune just praised Xcel Energy
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has been recognized for the twelfth consecutive year as one of Fortune's "World's Most Admired Companies," ranking first in social responsibility and fourth overall among electric and gas utilities. The company was lauded for its innovation, financial soundness, and commitment to delivering affordable and reliable energy. Xcel Energy's dedication to strengthening its grid and achieving bill growth below the rate of inflation while keeping electric bills 28% below the national average were highlighted as key achievements.

feed.title: Bank of America drops bold call on Roblox, sees massive upside
feed.summary: Bank of America maintains a bullish stance on Roblox, predicting massive upside due to the platform's evolving ecosystem and capacity to consistently generate new popular experiences. Despite third-party data suggesting a decline in user hours for top games, BofA highlights a significant increase in engagement for less popular games, indicating a broader platform growth. The firm raised its Q4 forecast for Roblox's bookings and sees the stock as a "dip buying" opportunity, projecting a price of $171.

feed.title: Textron (NYSE:TXT) Hits New 12-Month High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Textron (NYSE:TXT) recently hit a new 52-week high, trading at $95.45 on Wednesday, driven by strong Q4 EPS results and positive analyst upgrades. The company exceeded earnings estimates with $1.55 EPS, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus with price targets ranging from $96.33 to $115. Textron has also provided optimistic FY2025 guidance, projecting EPS between $6.00 and $6.20.

feed.title: Clorox Q2 Preview: Private Label Pressure Clouds The Outlook (NYSE:CLX)
feed.summary: The Clorox Company (CLX) is expected to report weak fiscal Q2 results, influenced by shipment headwinds and slowing consumption. While the company projects growth reacceleration in H2, increasing private label penetration presents a significant threat. Despite these concerns, weak growth is already factored into the stock price, with an estimated fair value of $113.

feed.title: Southern Company ranked No. 1 in industry on FORTUNE's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list
feed.summary: Southern Company has been recognized as the No. 1 company in the electric and gas utilities industry on FORTUNE's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list. The company earned this distinction for its financial soundness, long-term investment value, and community commitment. Chairman, President, and CEO Chris Womack attributed this achievement to the dedication of its 28,000 employees, emphasizing their focus on strengthening service, meeting growing demand, and disciplined financial management.

feed.title: Raymond James expands western housing bench with Goldberg hire
feed.summary: Raymond James has hired Greg Goldberg, a veteran multifamily housing finance banker from RBC Capital Markets, to lead its western multifamily public finance coverage. Goldberg, based in Denver, will focus on expanding the firm's housing practice, particularly in affordable and workforce housing. This strategic hire aims to enhance Raymond James' national housing finance practice and broaden its geographical reach, reinforcing its position as a top municipal bond underwriter.

feed.title: Lululemon halts online sales of new collection after sheerness complaints
feed.summary: Lululemon has temporarily stopped online sales of its new "Get Low" activewear collection due to customer complaints about the fabric's sheerness and sizing issues. The company stated it is pausing sales to understand feedback and provide product education, with plans to restore online availability soon. This incident follows previous product problems for Lululemon, including a 2013 recall of sheer yoga pants.

feed.title: CLIK Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:CLIK
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Click Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CLIK) stock performance, key financials, and company information. It details the stock's price movements, market capitalization, revenue, and employee data, noting a significant decrease in stock value since its IPO. The company, founded in 2024, specializes in personnel solutions and its stock is currently rated with a "sell" signal by technical analysis indicators.

feed.title: UnitedHealth to offer rebates to its Obamacare customers
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc. announced it would provide rebates to its Obamacare plan members in 2026, according to a prepared testimony from CEO Stephen Hemsley. This move comes as Americans face significantly higher healthcare costs due to the expiration of COVID-19-era tax credits for federally subsidized Obamacare plans. The company's decision aims to mitigate these rising costs, with UnitedHealth shares seeing a 2.5% increase following the announcement.

feed.title: Kroger Names New Senior Vice President, Division Leaders
feed.summary: Kroger has announced several leadership changes and promotions within its retail divisions. Victor Smith has been promoted to senior vice president of retail divisions, bringing over 40 years of grocery experience. Other key changes include Monica Garnes leading the Atlanta Division, Ken DeLuca heading the Fry’s Division, and Kendra Doyel moving to lead Ralphs, while Tom Schwilke and Colleen Juergensen are retiring.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Increases International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Price Target to $312.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for International Business Machines (IBM) to $312.00 from $290.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a potential upside of 5.58%. This follows IBM's recent strong quarterly earnings, where it surpassed EPS and revenue estimates, and its focus on enterprise AI initiatives through watsonx. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for IBM with an average target price of $306.86.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: General Dynamics (GD) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) is expected to report a year-over-year decline in Q4 earnings despite higher revenues, with analysts forecasting $4.10 per share and $13.73 billion in revenue. The company currently has an Earnings ESP of -1.04% and a Zacks Rank #3, making a positive EPS surprise difficult to predict. In contrast, industry peer Northrop Grumman (NOC) is more likely to beat estimates with an Earnings ESP of +0.54% and a Zacks Rank #3.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: Elevance Health (ELV) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: Elevance Health (ELV) is projected to report a year-over-year decline in earnings for Q4 2025, despite an expected increase in revenues. The consensus EPS estimate has been revised slightly lower, and analysts have recently become more bearish on the company's earnings prospects, resulting in a negative Earnings ESP. With a Zacks Rank of #4, it is difficult to definitively predict an earnings beat for ELV in its upcoming report on January 28.

feed.title: Douglas Emmett Target of Unusually Large Options Trading (NYSE:DEI)
feed.summary: Douglas Emmett (NYSE:DEI) recently experienced unusually high call option trading, with 2,500 call options bought, indicating bullish sentiment. Major institutional investors, including State Street Corp and Wellington Management Group LLP, have increased their stakes, bringing institutional ownership to 97.37%. Despite a high dividend yield of 6.9% and recent stock price increase, analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $15.00, while the company's dividend payout ratio is currently 633.33%.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Launches East Edge Corridor, Cutting Transit Times by 10 Hours
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) has launched its new East Edge corridor connecting Chicago and New England, which is expected to cut transit times by 10 hours and enhance transportation efficiency. This project includes extensive infrastructure upgrades, allows for increased double-stack capacity into Ayer, Massachusetts, and is considered a strategic milestone in the company's efforts to expand double-stack service across its network. Wall Street analysts currently forecast a price rise for NSC stock over the next 12 months, with an average 1-year price target of $316.56, though some recent analyst ratings have factored in potential impacts from a proposed merger with Union Pacific.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Sees Unusually Large Options Volume (NYSE:LW)
feed.summary: Lamb Weston (NYSE:LW) experienced unusual options trading volume on Wednesday, with traders purchasing 15,234 put options, representing a 278% increase over the average daily volume. The stock currently holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $54.18, following recent Q earnings that slightly beat expectations. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.38 per share, offering a 3.5% yield.

feed.title: Delta announces arrival of ‘basic’ first and business class seats in 2026
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines plans to introduce "basic" business and first-class fares starting in 2026, making it the first U.S. airline to unbundle premium seats from their usual extensive perks. This new offering aims to provide more choice and diversify pricing for customers who may want premium seating without all the associated amenities. While onboard services and cabin layouts are expected to remain the same, passengers opting for these basic premium fares will likely forgo benefits like flexible tickets, lounge access, and higher mileage accrual rates.

feed.title: The Truth About Cadence Design Systems: Is This Quiet Chip Stock Secretly Overpowered?
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) is presented as a quietly powerful stock in the chip design and electronic design automation (EDA) space, contrasting with more attention-grabbing companies like Nvidia. The article highlights Cadence's critical role in the development of AI chips, 5G, automotive, and cloud infrastructure, emphasizing its strong recurring revenue model and sticky customer base. While acknowledging its premium valuation and potential for volatility, the piece suggests Cadence is a long-term "cop" for investors focused on the essential infrastructure of the AI and chip ecosystem.

feed.title: Western Alliance Bank appoints Stephen McMaster as chief information security officer
feed.summary: Western Alliance Bank has appointed Stephen McMaster as its new Chief Information Security Officer. McMaster brings over 25 years of experience from financial institutions like Wells Fargo and will oversee the bank's cybersecurity strategy and risk management. This appointment reinforces Western Alliance's commitment to strengthening its operating model and capabilities as it approaches important asset milestones.

feed.title: FormFactor stock hits all-time high at 81.16 USD
feed.summary: FormFactor Inc.'s stock has reached an all-time high of $81.16, reflecting significant recent performance, including a 10.29% surge last week and an 81.72% increase over the past year. Despite being considered overvalued against its Fair Value, the company's strategic moves, such as acquiring Keystone Photonics and restructuring efforts, along with increased price targets from analysts, highlight its strong market position and investor confidence in the semiconductor industry. Investors are awaiting its next earnings report on February 4.

feed.title: Textron E-Z-GO Unveils Next-Gen 2027 Liberty Vehicle with Advanced Battery Technology
feed.summary: Textron E-Z-GO has launched its 2027 Liberty vehicle, featuring advanced Samsung SDI lithium battery technology for enhanced energy efficiency, longer range, and faster charging. The new model also integrates smart driving features like a 10-inch touchscreen and IntelliScreen, along with improved safety features such as a high-definition backup camera and IntelliBrake system. Analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on Textron (TXT) stock, with an average 1-year price target of $89.71, despite recent price target adjustments.

feed.title: Textron E-Z-GO Unveils 2027 Liberty Model with Advanced Battery Technology
feed.summary: Textron E-Z-GO has unveiled its 2027 Liberty model, featuring advanced Samsung SDI lithium battery technology for improved efficiency, range, and faster charging. The golf car also includes a 10-inch ECOXGEAR touchscreen with IntelliScreen functionality, enhanced safety features like a backup camera and IntelliBrake system, and versatile storage. Wall Street analysts have provided price targets for Textron (TXT), with an average 1-year target of $89.71, though they expect the stock price to fall.

feed.title: Is T Stock a Smart Investment Option Before Q4 Earnings Release?
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. is set to announce its Q4 2025 earnings on January 28, with current estimates for revenues at $32.75 billion and earnings at 47 cents per share. Despite efforts to expand its network and services, AT&T faces intense competition and increasing debt, leading Zacks Investment Research to suggest avoiding investment in the stock at this time. The company's valuation appears relatively cheaper than the industry, but high debt and competition are significant concerns.

feed.title: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) Hits New 52-Week High on Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Albemarle (NYSE: ALB) shares achieved a new 52-week high after BMO Capital Markets upgraded its price target from $145 to $210, maintaining an "outperform" rating. The stock traded as high as $180, closing previously at $172.54. Despite this, MarketBeat's consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with a $151.28 target, reflecting mixed analyst views on the specialty chemicals company.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Unveils East Edge Corridor to Boost Intermodal Capacity
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) has launched the East Edge corridor, a new double-stack intermodal route connecting Chicago and New England, expected to reduce transit times by up to 10 hours and boost intermodal growth. Following the announcement, NSC shares rose 1.9%. The company, a significant player in the transportation industry, shows strong operational efficiency and profitability, though its liquidity metrics suggest room for improvement.

feed.title: JPMorgan class action alleges tobacco surcharges violate ERISA
feed.summary: A new class action lawsuit has been filed against JPMorgan Chase & Co., alleging that the company unlawfully imposed punitive health insurance surcharges on employees who use tobacco products. The plaintiff, Robyn D. Carmichael, claims that JPMorgan violated the Employee Retirement Income Security Act (ERISA) by unfairly targeting employees based on their health status and failing to provide a reasonable alternative standard as required by law. The lawsuit seeks to represent a nationwide class of employees who paid the tobacco surcharge and demands declaratory and injunctive relief, reimbursement, disgorgement, and attorneys' fees.

feed.title: Host Hotels & Resorts stock hits 52-week high at $18.72
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts Inc. (HST) stock recently reached a 52-week high of $18.72, signaling strong investor confidence and a recovery trend. This comes after the company reported robust third-quarter 2025 performance, significantly surpassing EPS forecasts and achieving higher-than-projected revenue. The company also announced a successful $400 million senior notes offering while navigating mixed analyst ratings.

feed.title: Traders Buy High Volume of CDW Call Options (NASDAQ:CDW)
feed.summary: Traders observed an unusual surge in CDW call options, with 3,680 calls traded, representing a 2,244% increase over typical daily volume, indicating strong bullish sentiment. Despite this, the company faces mixed analyst sentiment, recent downgrades, and sector headwinds, which could pressure near-term performance. An insider also sold a significant number of shares, while institutional investors hold a large portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Textron (TXT) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Textron (TXT) is projected to announce higher earnings and revenues for the quarter ended December 2025, with an expected 32.1% year-over-year EPS growth and a 16.1% increase in revenues. Despite a positive Zacks Rank #3, the company has a negative Earnings ESP of -9.40%, making a definitive earnings beat difficult to predict. Investors are advised to consider other factors beyond earnings expectations, though Textron has consistently beaten EPS estimates in the past four quarters.

feed.title: EMPOWERED receives $50,000 grant from Molina Healthcare of Nevada to launch in-home recovery support program for pregnant and postpartum individuals
feed.summary: EMPOWERED, a program of Roseman University College of Medicine, has received a $50,000 grant from Molina Healthcare of Nevada to launch EMPOWERED Home (+). This new initiative will provide comprehensive, interdisciplinary in-home recovery support to pregnant and postpartum individuals in Las Vegas affected by substance use disorders, addressing social determinants of health and maternal mortality rates. The pilot program aims to serve 30 households over one year and will also offer community-based learning opportunities for medical students.

feed.title: Charles River Enters Manufacturing Collaboration with Gazi University
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. has announced a gene therapy contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) collaboration with Gazi University Faculty of Medicine. This partnership will focus on providing plasmid DNA for AAV production and in vitro efficacy studies, specifically supporting research into hyperphosphatemic tumoral calcinosis (HTC), a rare inherited disorder. The collaboration aims to accelerate the development of advanced therapies for rare diseases by combining academic innovation with CDMO expertise.

feed.title: Prologis shares climb after Q4 results beat forecasts on robust leasing demand
feed.summary: The provided article content was "MSN", which is insufficient to create a summary of Prologis' Q4 results. The article also does not contain any details about the leasing demand mentioned in the headline. Therefore, a summary cannot be generated from the given input.

feed.title: Celestica, Arista, Credo among BNP Paribas' top AI stocks for 2026 (CLS:NYSE)
feed.summary: BNP Paribas has identified Celestica, Arista, and Credo Technologies as its top artificial intelligence stock picks for 2026. The investment firm believes that data center investment will remain strong, providing good visibility for the server, networking, and storage sectors through 2026. This outlook suggests continued growth opportunities in the AI-related technology market.

feed.title: Price Over Earnings Overview: Paycom Software
feed.summary: Paycom Software Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) has seen a 1.60% stock increase in the current market session, though it decreased by 6.58% over the past month and 26.99% in the past year. The article analyzes Paycom's P/E ratio of 18.32, which is lower than the Professional Services industry average of 29.3, suggesting it might be undervalued or shareholders don't expect significant future growth. It emphasizes that the P/E ratio should not be used in isolation for investment decisions.

feed.title: EMPOWERED receives $50,000 grant from Molina Healthcare of Nevada to launch in-home recovery support program for pregnant and postpartum individuals
feed.summary: EMPOWERED, a program of Roseman University College of Medicine, has received a $50,000 grant from Molina Healthcare of Nevada to launch EMPOWERED Home (+). This new initiative will provide in-home comprehensive, interdisciplinary recovery support to pregnant and postpartum individuals in Las Vegas affected by substance use disorders. The program aims to address social determinants of health and improve outcomes for families by bringing medical clinicians, peer recovery specialists, and medical students directly into clients' homes.
